raw_cv_text:
Hiba Hewage
+44 (0)20 7946 8123 | Email: hiba.hewage@outlook.com | LinkedIn: hiba-hewage | GitHub: HibaHewage | https://hibahewage.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | BA in Computer Science 2021 - 2024
Achieved First-Class honors with distinction in full-stack web development coursework, ranking top 8% in cohort
Led 12-person capstone project team building a distributed task scheduling system, delivering 3 weeks ahead of deadline
University of Melbourne | Graduate Diploma in Information Technology 2020 - 2021
Completed accelerated program with 92% average, specializing in cloud architecture and microservices
Presented research paper on containerization optimization at tech symposium, attracting 150+ attendees
EXPERIENCE
Shopify | Junior Full Stack Engineer June 2024 - Present
Built and deployed 4 customer-facing REST APIs using Node.js and PostgreSQL, processing 500K+ daily transactions
with 99.7% uptime
Reduced critical bug resolution time by 65% through implementing automated regression test suite covering 87% of
codebase
Collaborated with product and design teams to ship 3 major feature releases, each reaching 40K+ active users within first
month
Datadog | Software Engineer Intern - Full Stack January 2024 - May 2024
Developed React dashboard component library with 22 reusable components, reducing frontend development time by
48% across 8 teams
Optimized MongoDB query performance by refactoring 15 aggregation pipelines, decreasing average latency from 850ms
to 180ms (79% improvement)
Mentored 2 new interns on full-stack best practices, resulting in 3 merged pull requests and production deployment of
their features
Figma (Creator Fund) | Full Stack Contractor September 2023 - December 2023
Engineered plugin API wrapper library in TypeScript, enabling 25+ third-party developers to integrate with Figma
platform
Implemented real-time collaboration features using WebSockets and Redis, reducing state sync latency by 71%
Achieved 94% code coverage on critical authentication modules through comprehensive unit and integration testing
strategy
PROJECTS
ByteFlow - Real-time Code Collaboration Platform | React, Node.js, WebSocket, MongoDB, April 2024 - June 2024
Docker, AWS EC2
Built end-to-end collaborative code editor supporting 50+ concurrent users with sub-200ms latency using operational
transformation algorithm
Implemented syntax highlighting for 15+ programming languages and achieved 92% test coverage across 3,200+ lines of
critical code
DataViz Analytics - Open Source Data Dashboard | Vue.js, Python Flask, PostgreSQL, August 2023 - December 2023
D3.js, GitHub Actions
Created modular analytics dashboard with 18 unique chart types, accumulating 2.8K GitHub stars and 340+ contributors
Optimized data rendering pipeline, reducing dashboard load time by 56% and enabling visualization of 1M+ data points
CloudSync - Smart File Synchronization Service | Go, gRPC, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, January 2024 - March 2024
React, S3
Engineered distributed file sync engine handling 10K+ files/minute across 5 cloud providers with 99.5% consistency
guarantee
Reduced infrastructure costs by 42% through intelligent sharding and edge caching strategies
AuthShield - Enterprise Authentication Library | TypeScript, Express.js, JWT, OAuth2, June 2023 - September 2023
Redis
Developed enterprise-grade authentication library with multi-factor authentication, supporting 8 identity providers and
150K+ monthly users
Published on npm registry with 18K+ weekly downloads and maintained 95% documentation coverage
TaskMaster API - High-Performance Task Queue | Rust, Tokio, RabbitMQ, PostgreSQL, November 2023 - January 2024
Prometheus
Built ultra-fast task processing system handling 100K+ jobs/hour with 99.99% delivery guarantee
Achieved 3.2x performance improvement over Node.js baseline, processing tasks in <5ms average latency
EXTRACURRICULAR
JavaScript Community UK - London Chapter | Co-organizer & Speaker March 2023 - Present
Organized 8 monthly meetups attracting 180+ JavaScript developers, growing community membership by 340%
Delivered talk on 'Building Scalable Node.js Architectures' to 120+ attendees, generating 8.5/10 average feedback score
Open Source Contributions | Active Maintainer January 2023 - Present
Contributed 47 pull requests to major open-source projects (React, Express.js, Playwright), achieving 89% merge rate
Maintained personal open-source library with 1.2K GitHub stars, resolving 94% of issues within 48 hours
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, SQL, HTML5, CSS3
Technologies – React, Node.js, Vue.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (EC2, S3,
Lambda), GraphQL, REST APIs, WebSocket
Tools – Git, GitHub, GitLab, VS Code, Docker, Postman, Jest, Vitest, webpack, npm, yarn, CI/CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab
CI), Linux, Vercel, Heroku

projects.subtitle: Vue.js, Python Flask, PostgreSQL
